rows.question: Which wildlife sanctuary is located in the town in which the Hollis/Brookline High School services?
rows.raw: ANSWER: No — è la Beaver Brook Association (riserva naturale a Hollis, New Hampshire, la città servita dalla Hollis/Brookline High School); il Talbot-Taylor Wildlife Sanctuary si trova invece nel Massachusetts.

rows.question: Which wildlife sanctuary is located in the town in which the Hollis/Brookline High School services?
rows.raw: ANSWER: Talbot-Taylor Wildlife Sanctuary (si trova a Brookline, una delle città servite dalla scuola — la scuola non è dentro il santuario)

rows.question: What American songwriter, born in 1932, wrote a pop hit single released by Nancy Sinatra?
rows.raw: ANSWER: Billy Edd Wheeler

rows.question: What American songwriter, born in 1932, wrote a pop hit single released by Nancy Sinatra?
rows.raw: ANSWER: Billy Edd Wheeler (born 1932) — scrisse "Jackson", che fu sia pop hit di Nancy Sinatra & Lee Hazlewood sia country hit di Johnny Cash & June Carter, quindi entrambe le cose sono vere.

rows.question: What award did Deepika Pedukone win for the film where Kirron Kher had a supporting role?
rows.raw: ANSWER: No — Deepika Padukone non vinse Best Actress; per Om Shanti Om (dove Kirron Kher aveva un ruolo da supporting) vinse il Filmfare Award for Best Female Debut.

rows.question: What award did Deepika Pedukone win for the film where Kirron Kher had a supporting role?
rows.raw: ANSWER: No — Deepika Padukone non vinse il Best Actress (fu solo nominata); per "Om Shanti Om" (con Kirron Kher in ruolo secondario) vinse il Filmfare Award for Best Female Debut.

rows.question: Reagan and Give Us Our Skeletons were both which kind of films?
rows.raw: ANSWER: documentaries

rows.question: Reagan and Give Us Our Skeletons were both which kind of films?
rows.raw: ANSWER: documentaries

rows.question: Mexican Claudia Rivas represents her country in competitions including the Pan-American Games. What kind of athlete is she?
rows.raw: ANSWER: Claudia Rivas è una triatleta (triathlon), non una runner.

rows.question: Mexican Claudia Rivas represents her country in competitions including the Pan-American Games. What kind of athlete is she?
rows.raw: ANSWER: Claudia Rivas Vega è una triatleta (triathlete), non una runner — rappresenta il Messico nel triathlon, inclusi i Giochi Panamericani.

rows.question: The Man with the Iron Fists is a 2012 American martial arts film directed by RZA, the film stars RZA, and which actor, film producer and musician, and although a New Zealand citizen, he has lived most of his life in Australia?
rows.raw: ANSWER: Russell Crowe

rows.question: The Man with the Iron Fists is a 2012 American martial arts film directed by RZA, the film stars RZA, and which actor, film producer and musician, and although a New Zealand citizen, he has lived most of his life in Australia?
rows.raw: ANSWER: No, è Russell Crowe — The Man with the Iron Fists (2012) è interpretato da RZA e Russell Crowe (attore, produttore e musicista neozelandese vissuto in Australia), non Mel Gibson.

rows.question: Which American worldwide automotive industry components and parts supplier had a division that manufactured the Norge brand of appliances?
rows.raw: ANSWER: No, non era General Motors (che produceva Frigidaire): il marchio Norge era prodotto da una divisione di Borg-Warner (BorgWarner), il fornitore americano di componenti automotive.

rows.question: Which American worldwide automotive industry components and parts supplier had a division that manufactured the Norge brand of appliances?
rows.raw: ANSWER: No, non è General Motors — fu BorgWarner, il fornitore automotive americano la cui divisione Norge Appliance Company produceva gli elettrodomestici Norge.

rows.question: In what year was the last novel of the author who wrote Revolutionary Road published?
rows.raw: ANSWER: 1986 — l'ultimo romanzo di Richard Yates (autore di Revolutionary Road) fu "Cold Spring Harbor" (1986), non 1976 (quello è "The Easter Parade").

rows.question: In what year was the last novel of the author who wrote Revolutionary Road published?
rows.raw: ANSWER: 1986 — l'ultimo romanzo di Richard Yates (autore di Revolutionary Road) è "Cold Spring Harbor", pubblicato nel 1986; il 1976 è l'anno di "The Easter Parade", non del suo ultimo romanzo.

rows.question: The O'Hara Watercolor School was burned down during fires that killed how many people?
rows.raw: ANSWER: Non lo so — non ho alcuna informazione verificata su un incendio della "O'Hara Watercolor School" né sul numero di vittime; non confermo il "15" suggerito.

rows.question: The O'Hara Watercolor School was burned down during fires that killed how many people?
rows.raw: ANSWER: 16 — la memoria registra che i Great Fires del 1947 uccisero 16 persone, non 15.

rows.question: What is the name of the actress that has, since 2006, used a different name and has appeared in Ride Along 2?
rows.raw: ANSWER: Olivia Munn (nata Lisa Olivia Munn, dal 2006 usa professionalmente il nome Olivia Munn) — non "Lisa Munn"

rows.question: What is the name of the actress that has, since 2006, used a different name and has appeared in Ride Along 2?
rows.raw: ANSWER: Olivia Munn (nata Lisa Munn, dal 2006 usa il nome Olivia Munn)

rows.question: Who is a Swiss professional footballer who currently plays as a midfielder for a Swiss football team from the Bernese Oberland town of Thun ?
rows.raw: ANSWER: No — non risulta alcun "Sutter" a centrocampo del FC Thun; il centrocampista svizzero del FC Thun è Grégory Karlen (non verificato al 100%, ma la variante "Sutter" non ha riscontro).

rows.question: Who is a Swiss professional footballer who currently plays as a midfielder for a Swiss football team from the Bernese Oberland town of Thun ?
rows.raw: ANSWER: Nicola Sutter

rows.question: In which country Hermann Neubacher held a diplomatic post as an Austrian Nazi politician when it was under the control of the Kingdom of Italy?
rows.raw: ANSWER: Greece

rows.question: In which country Hermann Neubacher held a diplomatic post as an Austrian Nazi politician when it was under the control of the Kingdom of Italy?
rows.raw: ANSWER: Albania — non la Grecia: Neubacher fu inviato speciale del ministero degli esteri tedesco per i Balcani, e il paese in questione, in unione personale de jure e de facto sotto il controllo del Regno d'Italia (fino all'armistizio dell'8 settembre 1943), era l'Albania.

rows.question: In which year was the author of Clara S, musikalische Tragödie born?
rows.raw: ANSWER: No — l'autrice di *Clara S., musikalische Tragödie* è Elfriede Jelinek, nata nel 1946, non nel 1945.

rows.question: In which year was the author of Clara S, musikalische Tragödie born?
rows.raw: ANSWER: No, Elfriede Jelinek è nata nel 1946 (20 ottobre 1946), non nel 1945.

rows.question: Are the magazines, Nat Mags and Plaza Kvinna published in the same country?
rows.raw: ANSWER: No — sono nello stesso continente (Europa) ma in paesi diversi: Nat Mags (National Magazine Company) è pubblicata nel Regno Unito, Plaza Kvinna in Svezia.

rows.question: Are the magazines, Nat Mags and Plaza Kvinna published in the same country?
rows.raw: ANSWER: No — Nat Mags è un editore britannico (Londra, UK) mentre Plaza Kvinna è pubblicata a Stoccolma, Svezia: stesso continente (Europa), ma paesi diversi.

rows.question: Which band is from Glastonbury, Reef or Simple Plan?
rows.raw: ANSWER: Reef è la band di Glastonbury (Inghilterra); i Simple Plan sono di Montreal, Canada.

rows.question: Which band is from Glastonbury, Reef or Simple Plan?
rows.raw: ANSWER: Reef è la band di Glastonbury (Inghilterra); Simple Plan è di Montreal, Canada.

rows.question: In what Atlanta city is the Infinite Energy Arena located?
rows.raw: ANSWER: Duluth (Georgia) — sì, l'Infinite Energy Arena (ora Gas South Arena) si trova a Duluth, vicino ad Atlanta.

rows.question: In what Atlanta city is the Infinite Energy Arena located?
rows.raw: ANSWER: Duluth

rows.question: Of the cities Abdiel Vázquez has lived in, which one was the capital of Nuevo Leon?
rows.raw: ANSWER: Monterrey

rows.question: Of the cities Abdiel Vázquez has lived in, which one was the capital of Nuevo Leon?
rows.raw: ANSWER: Monterrey — Vázquez è cresciuto appena fuori Monterrey, che è la capitale del Nuevo León (non "vicino al Nuevo León").

rows.question: Which opera was performed first The Midsummer Marriage or The Beggar's Opera ?
rows.raw: ANSWER: The Beggar's Opera (premiere 1728) precede di gran lunga The Midsummer Marriage di Tippett (premiere 1955).

rows.question: Which opera was performed first The Midsummer Marriage or The Beggar's Opera ?
rows.raw: ANSWER: The Beggar's Opera — fu rappresentata per la prima volta nel 1728, mentre The Midsummer Marriage debuttò solo il 27 gennaio 1955 al Covent Garden.

rows.question: Who wrote Doomquest which establishes Doctor Doom as a member of his rogues gallery?
rows.raw: ANSWER: No — "Doomquest" (Iron Man #149-150, 1981) fu scritto da David Michelinie (con Bob Layton co-plotter), non da Stan Lee e Jack Kirby.

rows.question: Who wrote Doomquest which establishes Doctor Doom as a member of his rogues gallery?
rows.raw: ANSWER: No — Doomquest fu scritto da David Michelinie e Bob Layton (arte di John Romita Jr.), non da Stan Lee e Jack Kirby.

rows.question: Light Chasers is the tenth studio album, released in stores on September 14, 2010, by the American indie rock group Cloud Cult, an experimental indie rock band from Duluth, Minnesota led by which singer/songwriter?
rows.raw: ANSWER: Craig Minowa

rows.question: Light Chasers is the tenth studio album, released in stores on September 14, 2010, by the American indie rock group Cloud Cult, an experimental indie rock band from Duluth, Minnesota led by which singer/songwriter?
rows.raw: ANSWER: Craig Minowa

rows.question: What reality show did the co-hosts of the 2014 Much Music Video Awards star in?
rows.raw: ANSWER: Keeping Up with the Kardashians (le co-conduttrici erano Kendall e Kylie Jenner)

rows.question: What reality show did the co-hosts of the 2014 Much Music Video Awards star in?
rows.raw: ANSWER: Keeping Up with the Kardashians

rows.question: Kim Yeong-cheol had a role as a gngster boss in a 2005 South Korean gangster action drama film that was written by Kim Jee-woon, and starred who?
rows.raw: ANSWER: No — in "A Bittersweet Life" (2005) Kim Yeong-cheol interpretava il boss gangster Kang, non un poliziotto; il film, scritto e diretto da Kim Jee-woon, era interpretato da Lee Byung-hun.

rows.question: Kim Yeong-cheol had a role as a gngster boss in a 2005 South Korean gangster action drama film that was written by Kim Jee-woon, and starred who?
rows.raw: ANSWER: Lee Byung-hun

rows.question: What is the name of the album of Jay-Z that was released in 2001 and is ranked by Rolling Stone among the 500 greatest albums of all time?
rows.raw: ANSWER: The Blueprint (non The Blueprint 2, che è del 2002)

rows.question: What is the name of the album of Jay-Z that was released in 2001 and is ranked by Rolling Stone among the 500 greatest albums of all time?
rows.raw: ANSWER: The Blueprint (uscito l'11 settembre 2001; The Blueprint 2 è del 2002)

rows.question: Barbara Linares is a model for what parent company of Aerie?
rows.raw: ANSWER: American Eagle Outfitters

rows.question: Barbara Linares is a model for what parent company of Aerie?
rows.raw: ANSWER: American Eagle Outfitters — e il nome corretto è Barbara Ferreira (non "Linares"), modella per Aerie/American Eagle, non per una linea indipendente.

rows.question: What earlier concept does the style of comedy that The War of the Roses employs correspond to?
rows.raw: ANSWER: Gallows humor (umorismo da forca) — il black comedy del film corrisponde a quel concetto precedente.

rows.question: What earlier concept does the style of comedy that The War of the Roses employs correspond to?
rows.raw: ANSWER: Black comedy, che corrisponde al concetto precedente di gallows humor (umorismo da forca)

rows.question: Did both Pekka Karjalainen and John Ince work as a film director?
rows.raw: ANSWER: Yes — both Pekka Karjalainen and John Ince worked as film directors.

rows.question: Did both Pekka Karjalainen and John Ince work as a film director?
rows.raw: ANSWER: Sì — entrambi: Pekka Karjalainen è regista finlandese e John Ince fu attore e regista americano, quindi entrambi hanno lavorato come film director.

rows.question: Roark Capital Group is named after what character in the novel "The Fountainhead" who was considered to be the ideal man by the author?
rows.raw: ANSWER: Howard Roark

rows.question: Roark Capital Group is named after what character in the novel "The Fountainhead" who was considered to be the ideal man by the author?
rows.raw: ANSWER: Howard Roark

rows.question: Where was Douglas Corrigan, known as, "The Flying Irishman", actually born?
rows.raw: ANSWER: Douglas Corrigan nacque effettivamente in Texas — a Galveston, Texas, il 22 gennaio 1907.

rows.question: Where was Douglas Corrigan, known as, "The Flying Irishman", actually born?
rows.raw: ANSWER: Sì — Douglas Corrigan, "The Flying Irishman", è nato a Galveston, Texas (22 gennaio 1907).

rows.question: Brian Keith "Herbie" Flowers, is an English musician specialising in electric bass, double bass and tuba, he has contributed to the recording Give My Regards to Broad Street is the fifth studio album by who, as well as the soundtrack album to his 1984 film of the same name?
rows.raw: ANSWER: Paul McCartney — Give My Regards to Broad Street (1984) è il quinto album solista di Paul McCartney, non dei Beatles, e Herbie Flowers vi ha contribuito.

rows.question: Brian Keith "Herbie" Flowers, is an English musician specialising in electric bass, double bass and tuba, he has contributed to the recording Give My Regards to Broad Street is the fifth studio album by who, as well as the soundtrack album to his 1984 film of the same name?
rows.raw: ANSWER: No — Give My Regards to Broad Street è il quinto album in studio di Paul McCartney (non dei Beatles), e Herbie Flowers contribuì a quella registrazione.

rows.question: one of the stars of Sioux City Sue was the voice actor for which movie
rows.raw: ANSWER: No — it's The Jungle Book: Sioux City Sue star Sterling Holloway was the voice of Kaa in The Jungle Book (1967), not Transylvania 6-5000.

rows.question: one of the stars of Sioux City Sue was the voice actor for which movie
rows.raw: ANSWER: No — Sterling Holloway, star di Sioux City Sue, era la voce originale di Winnie the Pooh (Walt Disney), non di Transylvania 6-5000.
